summary: Completed comprehensive end-to-end testing of Hanuman GPT AI Super App Phase 1 MVP. All backend APIs (100% success rate) and frontend features are fully functional. Chat, image generation, settings, and navigation working perfectly.
passed_tests: API Health Check - Hanuman GPT backend running
Chat endpoint with GPT-5.2 - Full AI conversation working
Hindi language chat - Bilingual support functional
Image generation - OpenAI GPT Image 1 working with download
Chat history persistence - Messages saved and retrieved
Error handling - Proper HTTP status codes
Home screen load - Branding and fire theme correct
Bottom navigation - All 4 tabs (Home, Chat, Image, Settings) working
Chat screen UI - Input, send button, message display working
Chat-backend integration - Real AI responses received
Image generation UI - Prompt input to image creation workflow
Settings screen - Language and voice selection functional
Voice recording buttons - UI elements present and clickable
Mobile-first responsive design - Proper viewport scaling
Fire theme compliance - Dark obsidian + orange/red accents, no purple/teal
Data-testid attributes - All interactive elements properly tagged
